phases.description: Core-owned fuzz profile and workload declaration are the source of campaign intent.
Build and dispatch the deterministic campaign through Homeboy's campaign primitive without executing fuzz locally.
phases.command: homeboy fuzz run-campaign --rig wordpress-core-fuzz-coverage --campaign-workload rest-api --request-id wave3-core-rest-api-campaign --strategy read-only --case-budget 25 --duration-budget-seconds 300 --max-duration 5m --seed 3 --tracker-ref "$WAVE3_TRACKER_REF" --required-artifact canonical_fuzz_envelope --required-artifact homeboy_fuzz_coverage --lab-only --runner "$HOMEBOY_RUNNER_ID" --detach-after-handoff --output "$WAVE3_OUT/campaign-dispatch.json"

phases.description: Filter the persisted resource lifecycle index artifact for the accepted campaign entry run.
Collect persisted evidence, artifacts, and stable reviewer refs after the run reaches a terminal state, including the canonical outcome envelope.
commands: homeboy runs refs --rig wordpress-core-fuzz-coverage --kind fuzz --tracker-ref "$WAVE3_TRACKER_REF" --artifact-kind canonical_fuzz_envelope --artifact-kind homeboy_fuzz_coverage --output "$WAVE3_OUT/reviewer-refs.json"

phases.description: Inspect worktree cleanup state without applying destructive cleanup.

blockers_to_proven: terminal persisted Homeboy run with homeboy/run-outcome-envelope/v1

phases.description: Woo campaign manifest declares workloads and required result, coverage, gap, and hotspot artifacts.
Build and dispatch the Woo DB/API campaign manifest through Homeboy's campaign primitive without executing fuzz locally.
phases.command: homeboy fuzz run-campaign --rig woocommerce-performance --campaign-manifest woocommerce/woocommerce/manifests/db-api-fuzz-campaign.json --request-id wave3-woo-db-api-campaign --strategy read-only --case-budget 80 --duration-budget-seconds 1200 --max-duration 20m --seed 3 --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF" --required-artifact canonical_fuzz_envelope --required-artifact homeboy_fuzz_coverage --required-artifact coverage_gap_report --required-artifact performance_hotspots_summary --lab-only --runner "$HOMEBOY_RUNNER_ID" --detach-after-handoff --output "$WC_OUT/campaign-dispatch.json"

phases.description: Filter the persisted resource lifecycle index artifact for the accepted campaign entry run.
Collect persisted evidence, artifacts, and stable reviewer refs after the run reaches a terminal state, including the canonical outcome envelope.
commands: homeboy runs refs --rig woocommerce-performance --kind fuzz --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF" --artifact-kind canonical_fuzz_envelope --artifact-kind homeboy_fuzz_coverage --output "$WC_OUT/reviewer-refs.json"

phases.description: Inspect worktree cleanup state without applying destructive cleanup.

blockers_to_proven: terminal persisted Homeboy run with homeboy/run-outcome-envelope/v1
reviewer-facing coverage_gap_report ref for full DB/API campaign promotion
reviewer-facing performance_hotspots_summary ref for full DB/API campaign promotion
